summary: Testing new features: PillarProductsTab component, BundlesManager enhancements, and unified pillar-products API. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working: CareManager (314 products), FitManager (216 products), DineManager (246 products) all using PillarProductsTab. BundlesManager shows 107 bundles with search. PricingHub shows 5789 products. Migration confirmed successful.

minor.issue: When both active_only=true AND search are passed, the $or clause for active_only is overwritten by $or for search (line 47-51 in pillar_products_routes.py). This means active_only filter is ignored when search is also present. Current frontend doesn't pass both simultaneously so not user-facing, but worth fixing.

issues: DineManager uses Button components (not TabsTrigger with role='tab') for its navigation tabs, making them harder to select in automated tests, but functionally correct

action_items: Minor: Fix pillar_products_routes.py to handle both active_only and search simultaneously using $and instead of overwriting $or
critical_code_review_comments: pillar_products_routes.py line 47-51: $or for active_only is overwritten when search is provided. Fix: use $and: [{$or: [active conditions]}, {$or: [search conditions]}]
PillarProductsTab.jsx line 67: useEffect only depends on [pillar] - this is intentional design (search triggered by button click) but may confuse developers expecting auto-search

bundle_routes.py get_bundles: When no bundles in DB and no search, returns default bundles - the total returned will be len(default_bundles) but skip/pagination is calculated on DB count (0). Minor inconsistency.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_Bundle_Delete_Me and TEST_Discount_Bundle for bundle CRUD tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel at /admin requires login: aditya/lola4304 via POST /api/admin/login. New features tested: (1) /api/admin/pillar-products unified endpoint - working with all 13 pillars, 5789 total products in products_master. (2) BundlesManager enhanced with search+pagination - 107 bundles total. (3) PillarProductsTab used by CareManager (314), FitManager (216), DineManager (246). (4) PricingHub Bundles tab shows all 107 bundles across 13 pillars. Admin nav: 14 PILLARS buttons use data-testid='admin-tab-{id}'. DineManager tabs are Button elements (not role='tab'). Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_new_features_iteration135.py

pillar_products_api.evidence: GET /api/admin/pillar-products?pillar=celebrate returns 902 products, 181 pages. Care returns 314, Dine 246, Fit 216. Search filter works. Pagination works.

bundles_pagination.evidence: GET /api/bundles returns pages field, supports search and pillar filter. 107 total bundles in DB.

care_manager_products.evidence: CareManager Products tab shows PillarProductsTab with 314 products from products_master, search input, category filter, add/edit/delete buttons

bundles_manager.evidence: BundlesManager has search bar, pillar filter buttons (All Pillars, Celebrate, Dine...), shows 107 bundles. AI-generated images visible on bundle cards.

fit_manager_products.evidence: FitManager Products tab shows PillarProductsTab with 216 products

dine_manager_products.evidence: DineManager Products tab shows PillarProductsTab with 246 products

pricing_hub_bundles.evidence: PricingHub Pillar Bundles tab shows 107 bundles across all 13 pillars. 5789 Total Products shown.

migration_confirmation.evidence: 5789 products in products_master (PricingHub stat). 107 bundles in bundles collection.
